title: Last Death Location
description: Shows your last death location, even if this mod was installed after that death
body:
This mod allows you to get your last death location,
**even if you died before installing this mod**!

Just simply write **/lastdeath** and you will see message with your last death location in the chat.

Also you can copy coordinates by just clicking the message.
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53f98129888e18939a0f40131248f2ca1fc2f271.png)
